title: The Breathtaking Patterns of Nature’s Canvas

scenes.text: Nature's own palette has painted this colorful landscape.
scenes.query: Zhangye Danxia Landform zhangye danxia aerial

scenes.text: This is Zhangye Danxia, located in Gansu Province, China.
The vibrant colors are a result of red sandstone and mineral deposits.
scenes.query: Zhangye Danxia Landform zhangye danxia colors

scenes.text: These formations are a UNESCO World Heritage site.
scenes.query: Zhangye Danxia Landform zhangye danxia site
scenes.label: UNESCO WORLD HERITAGE

scenes.text: Follow to see the world's hidden places.
scenes.query: Zhangye Danxia Landform zhangye danxia landscape

description: 📍 Zhangye Danxia, Gansu Province - China. A stunning landscape painted with vibrant colors formed from sandstone and mineral deposits. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
